p.strong: Property: At most one leader per term

ul.li: 🟣 Nodes in Quorum 1 (Majority for Candidate X)
🔵 Nodes in Quorum 2 (Majority for Candidate Y)

div.p: For cluster size N, majority Q is: Q = floor(N/2) + 1

ul.li: C votes for X [OK] Result: X becomes Leader
C: "Already voted for X in T5!"
E votes for Y [OK] Result: 2 Votes < Majority (3)

div.p: Any two majorities (Q1, Q2) of N nodes must share at least one node: Overlap ≥ 1
Since a node (C) can vote at most once per term, it cannot grant the vote needed for a second leader.
Safety Guaranteed. Election quorums are mutually exclusive for a single term. No split-brain is possible within the same Term ID.
